title: stipa humilis var. genuina
intro: Stipa humilis var. genuina is a type of grass found in the genus Stipa, commonly known as little barley or prairie junegrass. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and exhibit anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Stipa humilis var. genuina include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
